description: Key encounter scenarios for minion/summon targeting regression.

scenarios.note: Illusion minion (Parafright) should be deprioritized; focus TheObscura.
Disposable ToughEgg minions; kill Ovicopter first.
Summoned bots with MinionPower; kill Fabricator.
Peer summon without MinionPower; no minion wipe heuristic.
